toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Feature Specification: Agent Hierarchy & Team Structure

**Feature Branch**: `004-hierarchy`
**Created**: 2026-02-22
**Status**: Draft
**Authors**: Chairman + Claude

---

## Context

ClawCorp currently stores a flat list of agents with `reports_to` and `subordinates` fields, but there is no formal concept of a **team**. The Agents tab shows agents as a grid of cards with no visual hierarchy. Cross-agent delegation is individual-to-individual with no team boundary.

This spec introduces:
1. **Teams** as first-class entities вҖ” dynamic, chairman-created, extensible
2. **Hierarchical Agents view** вҖ” org chart showing team structure
3. **Cross-team collaboration** вҖ” structured task + context passing between team leads

The key constraint: **teams are dynamic**. The Chairman can add new teams at any time. No team names or structures are hardcoded.

---

## Architecture

### Team as a first-class entity

A team is a named group with one **lead** and any number of **members**. The lead is the external interface of the team вҖ” all cross-team tasks enter and exit through the lead.

```
Chairman
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Research Team          вҶҗ team entity
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Lead: Principal Investigator
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Members: Research Assistant, ...
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Engineering Team       вҶҗ team entity
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Lead: Product Manager
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Members: Architect, Senior Engineer, QA Engineer, Intern, ...
в””в”Җв”Җ [New Team]             вҶҗ Chairman can add at any time
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ Lead: [agent]
    в””в”Җв”Җ Members: [agents]
```

### Communication rules

- **Within a team**: members report to lead; lead reports to Chairman
- **Cross-team**: Lead вҶ’ Lead only. Team members do NOT directly contact agents in other teams
- **Escalation**: always goes up within the team first, then to Chairman if the lead is also blocked
- **Chairman**: passive observer; only contacted when all leads are blocked

### Context packet (cross-team handoff)

When a lead passes a task to another team's lead, a **context packet** travels with it:

```json
{
  "from_team": "engineering",
  "to_team": "research",
  "task": "...",
  "why": "We need this to complete the auth module",
  "known": "JWT is the chosen approach, user table schema is attached",
  "expected_output": "A security analysis report in markdown"
}
```

---

## User Scenarios & Testing

### User Story 1 вҖ” View the org chart (Priority: P1)

As Chairman, I want to see the entire organization as a hierarchy tree so I can understand who reports to whom and which team is doing what.

**Why this priority**: This is the primary visualization goal of the feature.

**Independent Test**: Open the Agents tab. See a tree layout with Chairman at top, teams as branches, leads below Chairman, members below leads. Running agents show a green dot.

**Acceptance Scenarios**:

1. **Given** 3 teams exist (Research, Engineering, a new custom team), **When** I open the Agents tab, **Then** I see a tree with 3 branches under Chairman, each showing the team name and lead
2. **Given** an agent is currently running, **When** I view the org chart, **Then** that agent's node shows a live green dot
3. **Given** I add a new team via the UI, **When** I return to the org chart, **Then** the new team appears as a new branch without page reload
4. **Given** an agent has no team assigned, **When** I view the org chart, **Then** it appears in an "Unassigned" section below the tree (not lost)

---

### User Story 2 вҖ” Create and manage teams (Priority: P1)

As Chairman, I want to create a new team by giving it a name and assigning a lead agent, so the org can grow without any hardcoded limits.

**Why this priority**: The entire feature is built on dynamic teams. Without this, hierarchy is static.

**Independent Test**: Click "New Team", enter name "Data Team", assign lead "data-analyst", confirm. The org chart gains a new branch.

**Acceptance Scenarios**:

1. **Given** I click "New Team" and fill in name + lead, **When** I confirm, **Then** a new team appears in the org chart immediately
2. **Given** a team exists, **When** I add an agent to it as a member, **Then** that agent appears as a child of the team lead in the org chart
3. **Given** a team has a lead, **When** I change the lead to a different agent, **Then** the old lead becomes a regular member and the new lead is elevated
4. **Given** I delete a team, **When** confirmed, **Then** member agents become "Unassigned" (not deleted) and the team branch is removed

---

### User Story 3 вҖ” Cross-team task delegation with context (Priority: P2)

As a team lead agent, I want to pass a task to another team's lead with a structured context packet, so the receiving team understands not just *what* to do but *why* and *what's already known*.

**Why this priority**: Without context, cross-team handoffs lose information and produce misaligned results.

**Independent Test**: Engineering Lead delegates to Research Lead via MCP `cross_team_delegate` tool. Research Lead receives task + context packet. Engineering Lead gets a result back when Research Team is done.

**Acceptance Scenarios**:

1. **Given** PM (Engineering lead) calls `cross_team_delegate` with task + why + known + expected_output, **Then** PI (Research lead) receives a mission with all four fields visible in the mission context
2. **Given** Research Team completes the delegated task, **When** PI calls `report`, **Then** the result is delivered back to PM's mission (not just to Chairman inbox)
3. **Given** a cross-team task is in flight, **When** I view the Inbox, **Then** I can see the cross-team handoff as a distinct event showing from-team вҶ’ to-team
4. **Given** the receiving lead is busy (agent running), **When** a cross-team delegate arrives, **Then** it queues and the lead picks it up on their next run

---

### User Story 4 вҖ” Hire an agent directly into a team (Priority: P2)

As Chairman, when hiring a new agent (manually or via Smart Hire), I want to assign them to a team immediately so they appear in the org chart in the right place.

**Why this priority**: Without this, hired agents land in "Unassigned" and must be manually placed.

**Independent Test**: In the Hire modal, there is a "Team" dropdown. Select "Research Team". New agent appears under Research Team in org chart.

**Acceptance Scenarios**:

1. **Given** I hire a new agent and select "Research Team", **When** hire completes, **Then** the agent appears as a member under PI in the org chart
2. **Given** Smart Hire infers the department from the description, **When** hire completes, **Then** the agent is automatically placed in the matching team
3. **Given** no matching team exists for the inferred department, **When** hired, **Then** the agent is placed in "Unassigned"

---

### Edge Cases

- What if a lead agent is fired? вҶ’ Team still exists; needs a new lead assigned before it can function. Show warning in org chart: "Team has no lead"
- What if a member is assigned to two teams? вҶ’ Not allowed. One agent = one team. Enforce on write.
- What if `reports_to` in `profile.json` contradicts team membership? вҶ’ Team membership wins. `reports_to` is derived from team structure, not the other way around.
- What is the maximum team size? вҶ’ No enforced limit.
- Can Chairman be a team lead? вҶ’ No. Chairman is above all teams.
- Can a team lead be a member of another team? вҶ’ No. Lead role is exclusive.
- What if cross-team delegate target lead is in a running mission? вҶ’ Queue the task as a pending message. Lead processes it on next available run.

---

## Requirements

### Data Model

**Team schema** (`teams/{id}/team.json`):
```json
{
  "id": "research-team",
  "name": "Research Team",
  "lead": "principal-investigator",
  "members": ["research-assistant"],
  "created_at": "ISO"
}
```

**Agent profile update** вҖ” add `team` field:
```json
{
  "id": "research-assistant",
  "team": "research-team",
  "reports_to": "principal-investigator"
}
```

`reports_to` is now **derived** from team structure (always = team lead), kept for backwards compatibility.

### New MCP Tool: `cross_team_delegate`

```
cross_team_delegate(
  to_team: string,          // team ID
  task: string,             // what to do
  why: string,              // why this is needed
  known: string,            // relevant context / prior work
  expected_output: string   // format or type of result expected
) вҶ’ { handoff_id: string }
```

Only callable by agents who are team leads. Non-leads get an error: "Only team leads can delegate cross-team."

### Functional Requirements

- **FR-001**: Teams MUST be stored as files in `teams/{id}/team.json` (dynamic, not hardcoded)
- **FR-002**: The Agents tab MUST render a tree layout (org chart) as the primary view
- **FR-003**: Each team node MUST show: team name, lead name, member count, running status
- **FR-004**: The tree MUST update in real time via WebSocket when agent status changes
- **FR-005**: `GET /api/teams` MUST return all teams with their leads and members resolved
- **FR-006**: `POST /api/teams` MUST create a new team (name + lead required)
- **FR-007**: `PATCH /api/teams/:id` MUST allow adding/removing members and changing lead
- **FR-008**: `DELETE /api/teams/:id` MUST move members to "Unassigned", not delete agents
- **FR-009**: New MCP tool `cross_team_delegate` MUST only be callable by team leads
- **FR-010**: Cross-team handoffs MUST appear as a distinct event type in the Inbox
- **FR-011**: Hiring (manual + smart) MUST include a team assignment field
- **FR-012**: An agent with no team MUST appear in an "Unassigned" section in the org chart

---

## Success Criteria

- **SC-001**: Chairman can read the entire org structure in under 5 seconds by looking at the org chart
- **SC-002**: Adding a new team takes < 30 seconds (name + lead, confirm)
- **SC-003**: Cross-team context packet eliminates the "why are we doing this" question вҖ” the receiving lead has all information needed to start immediately
- **SC-004**: No agent is ever lost вҖ” all agents appear in org chart (tree or Unassigned)
- **SC-005**: The org chart is fully dynamic вҖ” reflects real state with no page refresh needed

3. **Department as collapsible node**: Top-level shows departments with member count badges; click to expand into internal team tree

- **Collapsed**: Chairman вҶ’ CEO (Engineering (4), Product (2)) / CTO (Research Lab (3))
- **Click "Research Lab"**: Expands to show PI вҶ’ Scientists вҶ’ Interns with full tree

content.content:
1вҶ’# Feature Specification: Agent Hierarchy & Team Structure
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’**Feature Branch**: `004-hierarchy`
     4вҶ’**Created**: 2026-02-22
     5вҶ’**Status**: Draft
     6вҶ’**Authors**: Chairman + Claude
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’---
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’## Context
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’ClawCorp currently stores a flat list of agents with `reports_to` and `subordinates` fields. The Agents tab shows an org-chart tree rooted at Chairman, but the tree is flat вҖ” every agent is a direct report or one level deep. There is no formal concept of **executive roles**, **departments as groups**, or **rank levels** within a department.
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’This spec introduces a **corporate hierarchy** with three layers:
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’```
    17вҶ’Chairman (you)
    18вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ CEO
    19вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Engineering          вҶҗ department (clickable)
    20вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ VP of Engineering
    21вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Senior Engineer
    22вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Engineer
    23вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Intern
    24вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ...
    25вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Product              вҶҗ department (clickable)
    26вҶ’в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ Head of Product
    27вҶ’в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ ...
    28вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ CTO
    29вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Research Lab          вҶҗ department (clickable)
    30вҶ’в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ Principal Investigator
    31вҶ’в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Research Scientist
    32вҶ’в”Ӯ       в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Research Intern
    33вҶ’в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ ...
    34вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ [Other C-suite]
    35вҶ’```
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’**Key UX**: The top-level view shows Chairman вҶ’ C-suite вҶ’ Departments as collapsed nodes. Clicking a department expands it into its own internal tree showing the full team hierarchy (leaders, employees, interns).
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’---
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’## Architecture
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’### Three-tier hierarchy
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’1. **Chairman** вҖ” the user. Root of the tree. Passive observer.
    46вҶ’2. **C-suite** вҖ” executive agents (CEO, CTO, COO, etc.) that report directly to Chairman. Each oversees one or more departments.
    47вҶ’3. **Departments** вҖ” organizational units (Engineering, Research Lab, Product, etc.). Each department is a **team** with internal hierarchy.
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’### Agent rank levels
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’Within a department, agents have a `rank` field:
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’| Rank | Level | Description |
    54вҶ’|---|---|---|
    55вҶ’| `executive` | 0 | C-suite (CEO, CTO). Reports to Chairman. |
    56вҶ’| `director` | 1 | Department head (VP Engineering, Head of Product). Reports to a C-suite exec. |
    57вҶ’| `lead` | 2 | Team lead within a department. Reports to director. |
    58вҶ’| `senior` | 3 | Senior individual contributor. Reports to lead or director. |
    59вҶ’| `member` | 4 | Regular contributor. Reports to lead or director. |
    60вҶ’| `intern` | 5 | Entry-level. Reports to any senior+ agent. |
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’### Department as a group entity
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’A department is a named group stored as `teams/{id}/team.json`. It references:
    65вҶ’- A **department head** (director-level agent)
    66вҶ’- An **executive sponsor** (C-suite agent it reports into)
    67вҶ’- A list of **member agent IDs**
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’The internal tree structure within a department is derived from `reports_to` chains вҖ” not flattened.
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’### Communication rules
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’- **Within a department**: agents report up through the chain (intern вҶ’ lead вҶ’ director)
    74вҶ’- **Cross-department**: director вҶ’ director only. Lower-rank agents do NOT directly contact other departments
    75вҶ’- **To Chairman**: only C-suite executives escalate to Chairman. Lower agents escalate up through the chain
    76вҶ’- **Cross-team context**: when a director passes work to another department, a context packet travels with it (same as before)
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’---
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’## User Scenarios & Testing
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’### User Story 1 вҖ” View the corporate org chart (Priority: P1)
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’As Chairman, I want to see the organization as a multi-level tree: Chairman вҶ’ C-suite вҶ’ Departments (collapsed) вҖ” so I can quickly understand the structure.
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’**Independent Test**: Open the Agents tab. See Chairman at top, C-suite below, departments as collapsed nodes with member count badges. No need to scroll through every agent.
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’**Acceptance Scenarios**:
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’1. **Given** 2 C-suite agents (CEO, CTO) and 3 departments, **When** I open the Agents tab, **Then** I see Chairman вҶ’ CEO/CTO вҶ’ their respective departments as labeled nodes
    91вҶ’2. **Given** a department node shows "Engineering (4)", **When** I see it, **Then** the "(4)" indicates 4 agents within that department
    92вҶ’3. **Given** an agent is running in a department, **When** I view the top-level tree, **Then** that department node shows a green activity dot
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’---
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’### User Story 2 вҖ” Drill into a department (Priority: P1)
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’As Chairman, I want to click on a department (e.g. "Research Lab") to see its internal team tree вҖ” showing the hierarchy from director down to interns.
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’**Independent Test**: Click "Research Lab" node. The view expands (or navigates) to show the department's internal tree: Principal Investigator вҶ’ Research Scientists вҶ’ Interns.
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’**Acceptance Scenarios**:
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’1. **Given** I click on "Research Lab", **When** it expands, **Then** I see a tree rooted at the department head (e.g. Principal Investigator), with all members arranged by `reports_to`
   105вҶ’2. **Given** a department has 3 levels (director вҶ’ lead вҶ’ intern), **When** expanded, **Then** the tree shows all 3 levels with proper indentation
   106вҶ’3. **Given** I click the department again (or a "collapse" button), **When** it collapses, **Then** I return to the top-level view
   107вҶ’4. **Given** an agent within the department is running, **When** I view the expanded tree, **Then** that agent shows a green dot and running status
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’---
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’### User Story 3 вҖ” Create and manage teams (Priority: P1)
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’As Chairman, I want to create a new department, assign an executive sponsor and department head, and add members.
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’**Independent Test**: Click "New Department", enter name "Data Science", assign executive sponsor "CTO", assign department head, confirm. A new department node appears.
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’**Acceptance Scenarios**:
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’1. **Given** I click "New Department" and fill in name + executive sponsor + department head, **When** I confirm, **Then** a new department node appears under the chosen executive
   120вҶ’2. **Given** a department exists, **When** I add an agent to it, **Then** that agent appears within the department's internal tree
   121вҶ’3. **Given** I want to restructure, **When** I move an agent between departments, **Then** their `reports_to` updates and they appear in the new department
   122вҶ’4. **Given** I delete a department, **When** confirmed, **Then** member agents become "Unassigned" (not deleted)
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’---
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’### User Story 4 вҖ” Cross-department delegation with context (Priority: P2)
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’As a department head, I want to pass a task to another department's head with structured context, so the receiving department understands what to do, why, and what's already known.
   129вҶ’
   130вҶ’**Acceptance Scenarios**:
   131вҶ’
   132вҶ’1. **Given** Engineering director calls `cross_team_delegate` with task + context, **Then** Research director receives the task with full context
   133вҶ’2. **Given** a cross-department task completes, **When** the research director reports, **Then** the result goes back to the engineering director (not Chairman)
   134вҶ’3. **Given** a cross-department handoff is in flight, **When** I view the Inbox, **Then** I see it as a distinct event showing departmentвҶ’department
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’---
   137вҶ’
   138вҶ’### User Story 5 вҖ” Hire into the hierarchy (Priority: P2)
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’As Chairman, when hiring a new agent (manually or Smart Hire), I want to place them in a department at the right rank level.
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’**Acceptance Scenarios**:
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’1. **Given** Smart Hire infers department "Engineering" and rank "member", **When** hired, **Then** the agent appears in Engineering under the correct lead
   145вҶ’2. **Given** I hire a C-suite agent (e.g. COO), **When** hired, **Then** they appear as a direct report of Chairman at the top level
   146вҶ’
   147вҶ’---
   148вҶ’
   149вҶ’### Edge Cases
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’- What if a C-suite agent is fired? вҶ’ Their departments become "unsponsored" вҖ” show warning. Chairman must reassign.
   152вҶ’- What if a department head is fired? вҶ’ Department still exists but shows "No Head" warning. Chairman must assign a new one.
   153вҶ’- What if an agent's `reports_to` points to someone outside their department? вҶ’ Department membership wins. `reports_to` is corrected to the department head.
   154вҶ’- Can an agent be in multiple departments? вҶ’ No. One agent = one department.
   155вҶ’- Can Chairman be a department head? вҶ’ No. Chairman is above all departments and executives.
   156вҶ’- Maximum depth of hierarchy within a department? вҶ’ No enforced limit, but typical is 2-3 levels.
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’---
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’## Requirements
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’### Data Model
   163вҶ’
   164вҶ’**Team/Department schema** (`teams/{id}/team.json`):
   165вҶ’```json
   166вҶ’{
   167вҶ’  "id": "engineering",
   168вҶ’  "name": "Engineering",
   169вҶ’  "executive_sponsor": "ceo",
   170вҶ’  "head": "vp-engineering",
   171вҶ’  "members": ["senior-engineer", "engineer-1", "intern-1"],
   172вҶ’  "created_at": "ISO"
   173вҶ’}
   174вҶ’```
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’**Agent profile update** вҖ” add `rank` and `team` fields:
   177вҶ’```json
   178вҶ’{
   179вҶ’  "id": "senior-engineer",
   180вҶ’  "rank": "senior",
   181вҶ’  "team": "engineering",
   182вҶ’  "reports_to": "vp-engineering"
   183вҶ’}
   184вҶ’```
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’### UI Layout
   187вҶ’
   188вҶ’**Top-level view (collapsed)**:
   189вҶ’```
   190вҶ’Chairman в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ [You]
   191вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ CEO в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ executive
   192вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Engineering (4) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ [click to expand]
   193вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Product (2) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ [click to expand]
   194вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ CTO в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ executive
   195вҶ’    в””в”Җв”Җ Research Lab (3) в”Җв”Җв”Җ [click to expand]
   196вҶ’```
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’**Expanded department view** (e.g. click "Engineering"):
   199вҶ’```
   200вҶ’вҶҗ Back to Org Chart
   201вҶ’
   202вҶ’Engineering
   203вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ VP of Engineering в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ director
   204вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Senior Engineer в”Җв”Җ senior
   205вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Engineer в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ member
   206вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Intern в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ intern
   207вҶ’```
   208вҶ’
   209вҶ’### MCP Tool: `cross_team_delegate`
   210вҶ’
   211вҶ’```
   212вҶ’cross_team_delegate(
   213вҶ’  to_team: string,
   214вҶ’  task: string,
   215вҶ’  why: string,
   216вҶ’  known: string,
   217вҶ’  expected_output: string
   218вҶ’) вҶ’ { handoff_id: string }
   219вҶ’```
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’Only callable by agents with rank `director` or `executive`. Others get an error.
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’### Functional Requirements
   224вҶ’
   225вҶ’- **FR-001**: Teams/departments MUST be stored in `teams/{id}/team.json`
   226вҶ’- **FR-002**: The Agents tab MUST show a top-level tree: Chairman вҶ’ C-suite вҶ’ Departments (collapsed)
   227вҶ’- **FR-003**: Clicking a department MUST expand/navigate to show its internal hierarchy tree
   228вҶ’- **FR-004**: Each department node MUST show: name, member count, running status indicator
   229вҶ’- **FR-005**: Each agent node MUST show: title, rank badge, running status
   230вҶ’- **FR-006**: `GET /api/teams` MUST return all departments with resolved members and hierarchy
   231вҶ’- **FR-007**: `POST /api/teams` MUST create a new department (name + executive sponsor + head required)
   232вҶ’- **FR-008**: `PATCH /api/teams/:id` MUST allow adding/removing members and changing head
   233вҶ’- **FR-009**: `DELETE /api/teams/:id` MUST move members to "Unassigned", not delete agents
   234вҶ’- **FR-010**: `cross_team_delegate` MUST only be callable by director+ rank agents
   235вҶ’- **FR-011**: Cross-department handoffs MUST appear as distinct events in Inbox
   236вҶ’- **FR-012**: Hiring MUST include department + rank assignment (inferred by Smart Hire, manual for regular hire)
   237вҶ’- **FR-013**: Agents with no department MUST appear in "Unassigned" section
   238вҶ’- **FR-014**: The tree MUST update in real time via WebSocket
   239вҶ’
   240вҶ’---
   241вҶ’
   242вҶ’## Success Criteria
   243вҶ’
   244вҶ’- **SC-001**: Chairman can see the full org structure at a glance in < 3 seconds (collapsed view)
   245вҶ’- **SC-002**: Drilling into a department to see team details takes one click
   246вҶ’- **SC-003**: Adding a new department takes < 30 seconds
   247вҶ’- **SC-004**: No agent is ever lost вҖ” all appear in tree or Unassigned
   248вҶ’- **SC-005**: Org chart is fully dynamic вҖ” no page refresh needed
   249вҶ’

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { cors } from 'hono/cors'
     3вҶ’import { logger } from 'hono/logger'
     4вҶ’import { addClient, removeClient } from './lib/hub'
     5вҶ’import { agentRoutes } from './routes/agents'
     6вҶ’import { missionRoutes } from './routes/missions'
     7вҶ’import { runRoutes } from './routes/run'
     8вҶ’import { messageRoutes } from './routes/messages'
     9вҶ’import { delegateRoutes } from './routes/delegate'
    10вҶ’import { hireRoutes } from './routes/hire'
    11вҶ’import { taskRoutes } from './routes/tasks'
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’const app = new Hono()
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’app.use('*', cors({ origin: 'http://localhost:5173' }))
    16вҶ’app.use('*', logger())
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’app.route('/api/agents', agentRoutes)
    19вҶ’app.route('/api/missions', missionRoutes)
    20вҶ’app.route('/api/run', runRoutes)
    21вҶ’app.route('/api/messages', messageRoutes)
    22вҶ’app.route('/api/delegate', delegateRoutes)
    23вҶ’app.route('/api/hire', hireRoutes)
    24вҶ’app.route('/api/tasks', taskRoutes)
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’app.get('/health', (c) => c.json({ status: 'ok', time: new Date().toISOString() }))
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’const server = Bun.serve({
    29вҶ’  port: 3001,
    30вҶ’  fetch(req, server) {
    31вҶ’    if (req.headers.get('upgrade') === 'websocket') {
    32вҶ’      const ok = server.upgrade(req)
    33вҶ’      if (ok) return undefined
    34вҶ’      return new Response('WebSocket upgrade failed', { status: 400 })
    35вҶ’    }
    36вҶ’    return app.fetch(req)
    37вҶ’  },
    38вҶ’  websocket: {
    39вҶ’    open(ws) { addClient(ws) },
    40вҶ’    close(ws) { removeClient(ws) },
    41вҶ’    message() {}
    42вҶ’  }
    43вҶ’})
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’console.log(`ClawCorp server вҶ’ http://localhost:${server.port}`)

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { readdir, readFile } from 'fs/promises'
     3вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’export const agentRoutes = new Hono()
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’const AGENTS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../agents')
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’agentRoutes.get('/', async (c) => {
    10вҶ’  const dirs = await readdir(AGENTS_DIR, { withFileTypes: true })
    11вҶ’  const agents = await Promise.all(
    12вҶ’    dirs
    13вҶ’      .filter(d => d.isDirectory())
    14вҶ’      .map(async d => {
    15вҶ’        const profilePath = join(AGENTS_DIR, d.name, 'profile.json')
    16вҶ’        const memPath = join(AGENTS_DIR, d.name, 'memory.md')
    17вҶ’        try {
    18вҶ’          const profile = JSON.parse(await readFile(profilePath, 'utf-8'))
    19вҶ’          const memory = await readFile(memPath, 'utf-8').catch(() => '')
    20вҶ’          return { ...profile, memory, status: 'idle' }
    21вҶ’        } catch {
    22вҶ’          return { id: d.name, title: d.name, status: 'idle' }
    23вҶ’        }
    24вҶ’      })
    25вҶ’  )
    26вҶ’  return c.json(agents)
    27вҶ’})
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’agentRoutes.get('/:id', async (c) => {
    30вҶ’  const id = c.req.param('id')
    31вҶ’  const profilePath = join(AGENTS_DIR, id, 'profile.json')
    32вҶ’  const profile = JSON.parse(await readFile(profilePath, 'utf-8'))
    33вҶ’  return c.json(profile)
    34вҶ’})
    35вҶ’

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { runAgent } from '../lib/AgentRunner'
     3вҶ’import { readFile, writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises'
     4вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’export const delegateRoutes = new Hono()
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’const MISSIONS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../missions')
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’// POST /api/delegate вҖ” manager delegates sub-task to subordinate
    11вҶ’delegateRoutes.post('/', async (c) => {
    12вҶ’  const { fromAgentId, toAgentId, missionId, task, workspace } = await c.req.json()
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’  const subMissionId = `${missionId}-${toAgentId}-${Date.now()}`
    15вҶ’  const subDir = join(MISSIONS_DIR, subMissionId)
    16вҶ’  await mkdir(join(subDir, 'artifacts'), { recursive: true })
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’  const state = {
    19вҶ’    id: subMissionId,
    20вҶ’    title: task.slice(0, 80),
    21вҶ’    type: 'engineering',
    22вҶ’    status: 'in_progress',
    23вҶ’    current_stage: 'development',
    24вҶ’    assignee: toAgentId,
    25вҶ’    parent_mission: missionId,
    26вҶ’    delegated_by: fromAgentId,
    27вҶ’    workspace: workspace ?? null,
    28вҶ’    sessions: {},
    29вҶ’    created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    30вҶ’    history: [{ at: new Date().toISOString(), event: 'delegated', from: fromAgentId }],
    31вҶ’  }
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’  await writeFile(join(subDir, 'state.json'), JSON.stringify(state, null, 2))
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’  // Fire sub-agent
    36вҶ’  runAgent(toAgentId, subMissionId, task, { workspace }).catch((err) => {
    37вҶ’    console.error(`Delegated agent ${toAgentId} failed:`, err.message)
    38вҶ’  })
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’  return c.json({ ok: true, subMissionId })
    41вҶ’})
    42вҶ’

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { readFile, writeFile, mkdir, rename } from 'fs/promises'
     3вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     4вҶ’import { existsSync } from 'fs'
     5вҶ’import { runSmartHire } from '../lib/SmartHire'
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’export const hireRoutes = new Hono()
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’const AGENTS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../agents')
    10вҶ’const ARCHIVE_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../archive')
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’// POST /api/hire вҖ” create new agent
    13вҶ’hireRoutes.post('/', async (c) => {
    14вҶ’  const body = await c.req.json()
    15вҶ’  const { id, title, department, description, reports_to, system_prompt, cost_model } = body
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’  if (!id || !title) return c.json({ error: 'id and title required' }, 400)
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’  const agentDir = join(AGENTS_DIR, id)
    20вҶ’  if (existsSync(agentDir)) return c.json({ error: `Agent ${id} already exists` }, 409)
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’  await mkdir(agentDir, { recursive: true })
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’  const profile = {
    25вҶ’    id,
    26вҶ’    title,
    27вҶ’    department: department ?? 'Engineering',
    28вҶ’    description: description ?? '',
    29вҶ’    driver: {
    30вҶ’      type: 'claude-code',
    31вҶ’      command: 'claude',
    32вҶ’      args: ['--dangerously-skip-permissions', '-p', '{{full_prompt}}'],
    33вҶ’      system_prompt: system_prompt ?? `You are ${title} at ClawCorp.\n\nRULES:\n1. Never ask questions. Make assumptions and proceed.\n2. Use escalate tool if blocked.\n3. Use report tool when done.`,
    34вҶ’    },
    35вҶ’    reports_to: reports_to ?? 'chairman',
    36вҶ’    subordinates: [],
    37вҶ’    cost_model: cost_model ?? 'medium',
    38вҶ’  }
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’  await writeFile(join(agentDir, 'profile.json'), JSON.stringify(profile, null, 2))
    41вҶ’  await writeFile(join(agentDir, 'memory.md'), `# ${title} Memory\n\n`)
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’  return c.json(profile, 201)
    44вҶ’})
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’// POST /api/hire/smart вҖ” smart hire via natural language
    47вҶ’hireRoutes.post('/smart', async (c) => {
    48вҶ’  const body = await c.req.json()
    49вҶ’  const { description } = body
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’  if (!description?.trim()) return c.json({ error: 'description required' }, 400)
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’  const hireId = `${Date.now()}`
    54вҶ’  // Fire and forget вҖ” progress streams via WebSocket
    55вҶ’  runSmartHire(description.trim(), hireId)
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’  return c.json({ ok: true, hireId })
    58вҶ’})
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’// DELETE /api/hire/:id вҖ” fire (archive) agent
    61вҶ’hireRoutes.delete('/:id', async (c) => {
    62вҶ’  const id = c.req.param('id')
    63вҶ’  const agentDir = join(AGENTS_DIR, id)
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’  if (!existsSync(agentDir)) return c.json({ error: 'Agent not found' }, 404)
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’  await mkdir(ARCHIVE_DIR, { recursive: true })
    68вҶ’  const archivePath = join(ARCHIVE_DIR, `${id}-${Date.now()}`)
    69вҶ’  await rename(agentDir, archivePath)
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’  return c.json({ ok: true, archived: archivePath })
    72вҶ’})
    73вҶ’

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { readdir, readFile, writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises'
     3вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     4вҶ’import { existsSync } from 'fs'
     5вҶ’import { broadcast } from '../lib/hub'
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’export const messageRoutes = new Hono()
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’const MISSIONS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../missions')
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’let msgCounter = 0
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’function msgId() {
    14вҶ’  return `MSG-${Date.now()}-${++msgCounter}`
    15вҶ’}
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’// GET /api/messages?missionId=&status=&to=
    18вҶ’messageRoutes.get('/', async (c) => {
    19вҶ’  const { missionId, status, to } = c.req.query()
    20вҶ’  const results: unknown[] = []
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’  if (!existsSync(MISSIONS_DIR)) return c.json([])
    23вҶ’  const dirs = await readdir(MISSIONS_DIR, { withFileTypes: true })
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’  for (const d of dirs.filter((d) => d.isDirectory())) {
    26вҶ’    if (missionId && d.name !== missionId) continue
    27вҶ’    const msgDir = join(MISSIONS_DIR, d.name, 'messages')
    28вҶ’    if (!existsSync(msgDir)) continue
    29вҶ’    const files = await readdir(msgDir).catch(() => [])
    30вҶ’    for (const f of files.filter((f) => f.endsWith('.json'))) {
    31вҶ’      const msg = JSON.parse(await readFile(join(msgDir, f), 'utf-8'))
    32вҶ’      if (status && msg.status !== status) continue
    33вҶ’      if (to && msg.to !== to) continue
    34вҶ’      results.push(msg)
    35вҶ’    }
    36вҶ’  }
    37вҶ’
    38вҶ’  return c.json(results)
    39вҶ’})
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’// GET /api/messages/:id
    42вҶ’messageRoutes.get('/:id', async (c) => {
    43вҶ’  const id = c.req.param('id')
    44вҶ’  if (!existsSync(MISSIONS_DIR)) return c.json({ error: 'not found' }, 404)
    45вҶ’  const dirs = await readdir(MISSIONS_DIR, { withFileTypes: true })
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’  for (const d of dirs.filter((d) => d.isDirectory())) {
    48вҶ’    const path = join(MISSIONS_DIR, d.name, 'messages', `${id}.json`)
    49вҶ’    if (existsSync(path)) {
    50вҶ’      return c.json(JSON.parse(await readFile(path, 'utf-8')))
    51вҶ’    }
    52вҶ’  }
    53вҶ’  return c.json({ error: 'not found' }, 404)
    54вҶ’})
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’// POST /api/messages вҖ” create escalation or report
    57вҶ’messageRoutes.post('/', async (c) => {
    58вҶ’  const body = await c.req.json()
    59вҶ’  const { from, missionId, type, question, context, summary, artifacts } = body
    60вҶ’
    61вҶ’  // Resolve supervisor
    62вҶ’  const AGENTS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../agents')
    63вҶ’  let to = 'chairman'
    64вҶ’  try {
    65вҶ’    const profile = JSON.parse(await readFile(join(AGENTS_DIR, from, 'profile.json'), 'utf-8'))
    66вҶ’    to = profile.reports_to ?? 'chairman'
    67вҶ’  } catch {}
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’  const id = msgId()
    70вҶ’  const msg = {
    71вҶ’    id,
    72вҶ’    from,
    73вҶ’    to,
    74вҶ’    missionId,
    75вҶ’    type,
    76вҶ’    question: question ?? null,
    77вҶ’    context: context ?? null,
    78вҶ’    summary: summary ?? null,
    79вҶ’    artifacts: artifacts ?? [],
    80вҶ’    status: type === 'report' ? 'done' : 'pending',
    81вҶ’    answer: null,
    82вҶ’    created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    83вҶ’    answered_at: null,
    84вҶ’  }
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’  const msgDir = join(MISSIONS_DIR, missionId, 'messages')
    87вҶ’  await mkdir(msgDir, { recursive: true })
    88вҶ’  await writeFile(join(msgDir, `${id}.json`), JSON.stringify(msg, null, 2))
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’  broadcast('message:new', msg)
    91вҶ’
    92вҶ’  // Auto-update mission state if report
    93вҶ’  if (type === 'report') {
    94вҶ’    const statePath = join(MISSIONS_DIR, missionId, 'state.json')
    95вҶ’    if (existsSync(statePath)) {
    96вҶ’      const state = JSON.parse(await readFile(statePath, 'utf-8'))
    97вҶ’      state.status = 'done'
    98вҶ’      state.current_stage = 'done'
    99вҶ’      state.history.push({ at: new Date().toISOString(), event: 'reported', summary })
   100вҶ’      await writeFile(statePath, JSON.stringify(state, null, 2))
   101вҶ’      broadcast('mission:done', { missionId, summary })
   102вҶ’    }
   103вҶ’  }
   104вҶ’
   105вҶ’  return c.json(msg, 201)
   106вҶ’})
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’// POST /api/messages/:id/answer вҖ” Chairman or supervisor answers
   109вҶ’messageRoutes.post('/:id/answer', async (c) => {
   110вҶ’  const id = c.req.param('id')
   111вҶ’  const { answer } = await c.req.json()
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’  if (!existsSync(MISSIONS_DIR)) return c.json({ error: 'not found' }, 404)
   114вҶ’  const dirs = await readdir(MISSIONS_DIR, { withFileTypes: true })
   115вҶ’
   116вҶ’  for (const d of dirs.filter((d) => d.isDirectory())) {
   117вҶ’    const path = join(MISSIONS_DIR, d.name, 'messages', `${id}.json`)
   118вҶ’    if (existsSync(path)) {
   119вҶ’      const msg = JSON.parse(await readFile(path, 'utf-8'))
   120вҶ’      msg.answer = answer
   121вҶ’      msg.status = 'answered'
   122вҶ’      msg.answered_at = new Date().toISOString()
   123вҶ’      await writeFile(path, JSON.stringify(msg, null, 2))
   124вҶ’      broadcast('message:answered', msg)
   125вҶ’      return c.json(msg)
   126вҶ’    }
   127вҶ’  }
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’  return c.json({ error: 'not found' }, 404)
   130вҶ’})
   131вҶ’

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { readdir, readFile, writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises'
     3вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     4вҶ’import { existsSync } from 'fs'
     5вҶ’import { broadcast } from '../lib/hub'
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’export const missionRoutes = new Hono()
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’const MISSIONS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../missions')
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’missionRoutes.get('/', async (c) => {
    12вҶ’  if (!existsSync(MISSIONS_DIR)) return c.json([])
    13вҶ’  const dirs = await readdir(MISSIONS_DIR, { withFileTypes: true })
    14вҶ’  const missions = await Promise.all(
    15вҶ’    dirs
    16вҶ’      .filter(d => d.isDirectory())
    17вҶ’      .map(async d => {
    18вҶ’        const statePath = join(MISSIONS_DIR, d.name, 'state.json')
    19вҶ’        try {
    20вҶ’          return JSON.parse(await readFile(statePath, 'utf-8'))
    21вҶ’        } catch {
    22вҶ’          return { id: d.name }
    23вҶ’        }
    24вҶ’      })
    25вҶ’  )
    26вҶ’  return c.json(missions)
    27вҶ’})
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’missionRoutes.post('/', async (c) => {
    30вҶ’  const body = await c.req.json()
    31вҶ’  const id = `M-${Date.now()}`
    32вҶ’  const missionDir = join(MISSIONS_DIR, id)
    33вҶ’  await mkdir(join(missionDir, 'artifacts'), { recursive: true })
    34вҶ’  const state = {
    35вҶ’    id,
    36вҶ’    title: body.title,
    37вҶ’    type: body.type ?? 'engineering',
    38вҶ’    status: 'backlog',
    39вҶ’    current_stage: 'backlog',
    40вҶ’    assignee: null,
    41вҶ’    workspace: body.workspace ?? null,
    42вҶ’    sessions: {},
    43вҶ’    created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    44вҶ’    history: []
    45вҶ’  }
    46вҶ’  await writeFile(join(missionDir, 'state.json'), JSON.stringify(state, null, 2))
    47вҶ’  return c.json(state, 201)
    48вҶ’})
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’// PATCH /api/missions/:id вҖ” update stage (drag-and-drop)
    51вҶ’missionRoutes.patch('/:id', async (c) => {
    52вҶ’  const id = c.req.param('id')
    53вҶ’  const body = await c.req.json()
    54вҶ’  const statePath = join(MISSIONS_DIR, id, 'state.json')
    55вҶ’  if (!existsSync(statePath)) return c.json({ error: 'not found' }, 404)
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’  const state = JSON.parse(await readFile(statePath, 'utf-8'))
    58вҶ’  if (body.current_stage) state.current_stage = body.current_stage
    59вҶ’  if (body.status) state.status = body.status
    60вҶ’  if (body.assignee !== undefined) state.assignee = body.assignee
    61вҶ’  state.history.push({ at: new Date().toISOString(), event: 'updated', changes: body })
    62вҶ’  await writeFile(statePath, JSON.stringify(state, null, 2))
    63вҶ’  broadcast('mission:updated', state)
    64вҶ’  return c.json(state)
    65вҶ’})
    66вҶ’

1вҶ’import { Hono } from 'hono'
     2вҶ’import { runAgent, killAgent, isRunning, getRunningAgents } from '../lib/AgentRunner'
     3вҶ’import { readFile, writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises'
     4вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     5вҶ’import { existsSync } from 'fs'
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’export const runRoutes = new Hono()
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’const MISSIONS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../missions')
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’runRoutes.get('/', (c) => {
    12вҶ’  return c.json(getRunningAgents())
    13вҶ’})
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’runRoutes.post('/', async (c) => {
    16вҶ’  const body = await c.req.json()
    17вҶ’  const { agentId, missionId, prompt, workspace, resume, sessionId } = body
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’  if (!agentId || !missionId || !prompt) {
    20вҶ’    return c.json({ error: 'agentId, missionId, prompt required' }, 400)
    21вҶ’  }
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’  if (isRunning(agentId)) {
    24вҶ’    return c.json({ error: `Agent ${agentId} is already busy` }, 409)
    25вҶ’  }
    26вҶ’
    27вҶ’  // Update mission state
    28вҶ’  const statePath = join(MISSIONS_DIR, missionId, 'state.json')
    29вҶ’  if (existsSync(statePath)) {
    30вҶ’    try {
    31вҶ’      const state = JSON.parse(await readFile(statePath, 'utf-8'))
    32вҶ’      state.status = 'in_progress'
    33вҶ’      state.current_stage = 'development'
    34вҶ’      state.assignee = agentId
    35вҶ’      if (workspace) state.workspace = workspace
    36вҶ’      state.history = state.history ?? []
    37вҶ’      state.history.push({ at: new Date().toISOString(), event: 'started', agentId, workspace })
    38вҶ’      await writeFile(statePath, JSON.stringify(state, null, 2))
    39вҶ’    } catch {}
    40вҶ’  }
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’  runAgent(agentId, missionId, prompt, { workspace, resume, sessionId }).catch((err) => {
    43вҶ’    console.error(`Agent ${agentId} error:`, err.message)
    44вҶ’  })
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’  return c.json({ ok: true, agentId, missionId, workspace })
    47вҶ’})
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’runRoutes.delete('/:agentId', (c) => {
    50вҶ’  const agentId = c.req.param('agentId')
    51вҶ’  killAgent(agentId)
    52вҶ’  return c.json({ ok: true })
    53вҶ’})
    54вҶ’

    54вҶ’  if (body.push_back) {
    55вҶ’    state.status = 'in_progress'
    56вҶ’    state.feedback.push({ text: body.push_back, at: new Date().toISOString() })
    57вҶ’  }
    58вҶ’  await writeFile(statePath, JSON.stringify(state, null, 2))
    59вҶ’  broadcast('task:updated', state)
    60вҶ’  return c.json(state)
    61вҶ’})
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’taskRoutes.delete('/:id', async (c) => {
    64вҶ’  const id = c.req.param('id')
    65вҶ’  const taskDir = join(TASKS_DIR, id)
    66вҶ’  if (!existsSync(taskDir)) return c.json({ error: 'not found' }, 404)
    67вҶ’  await rm(taskDir, { recursive: true })
    68вҶ’  broadcast('task:deleted', { id })
    69вҶ’  return c.json({ ok: true })
    70вҶ’})
    71вҶ’

     7вҶ’    "type": "claude-code",

Work autonomously. Use bash to run Python, search papers, create plots, write files.\n3. If you need direction, use the 'escalate' MCP tool to ask your PI вҖ” not the user.\n4. When done, use the 'report' MCP tool with a summary of findings and artifacts.\n5. Produce concrete outputs: code files, plots, reports in the workspace directory.\n\nDefault behavior when uncertain: pick the most interesting interpretation and proceed."
    11вҶ’  },

1вҶ’import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
     2вҶ’import { writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises'
     3вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
     4вҶ’import { existsSync } from 'fs'
     5вҶ’import { broadcast } from './hub'
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’const AGENTS_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../agents')
     8вҶ’const ARCHIVE_DIR = join(import.meta.dir, '../../../archive')
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’const TEST_TASKS: Record<string, string> = {
    11вҶ’  Engineering:
    12вҶ’    'Write a TypeScript function isPalindrome(s: string): boolean with 3 test cases',
    13вҶ’  'Research Lab':
    14вҶ’    'List 5 open research questions in the field of autonomous AI agents',
    15вҶ’  Product:
    16вҶ’    'Write 3 Given/When/Then acceptance scenarios for a user login feature',
    17вҶ’}
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’type Candidate = {
    20вҶ’  id: string
    21вҶ’  title: string
    22вҶ’  department: string
    23вҶ’  description: string
    24вҶ’  reports_to: string
    25вҶ’  system_prompt: string
    26вҶ’}
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’type InterviewResult = {
    29вҶ’  candidate: Candidate
    30вҶ’  output: string
    31вҶ’  exitCode: number
    32вҶ’  scores?: {
    33вҶ’    task_completion: number
    34вҶ’    output_quality: number
    35вҶ’    autonomy: number
    36вҶ’    conciseness: number
    37вҶ’    weighted: number
    38вҶ’  }
    39вҶ’}
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’export async function runSmartHire(description: string, hireId: string) {
    42вҶ’  const anthropic = new Anthropic()
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’  try {
    45вҶ’    broadcast('hire:start', { hireId, description })
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’    // Phase 1: Generate candidates
    48вҶ’    const candidates = await generateCandidates(anthropic, description)
    49вҶ’    broadcast('hire:candidates', {
    50вҶ’      hireId,
    51вҶ’      candidates: candidates.map((c) => ({ id: c.id, title: c.title })),
    52вҶ’    })
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’    // Phase 2: Run interviews in parallel
    55вҶ’    const results: InterviewResult[] = []
    56вҶ’    const interviews = candidates.map(async (candidate) => {
    57вҶ’      broadcast('hire:interview_start', { hireId, candidateId: candidate.id })
    58вҶ’      const result = await runInterview(candidate)
    59вҶ’      broadcast('hire:interview_done', {
    60вҶ’        hireId,
    61вҶ’        candidateId: candidate.id,
    62вҶ’        exitCode: result.exitCode,
    63вҶ’      })
    64вҶ’      return result
    65вҶ’    })
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’    const interviewResults = await Promise.all(interviews)
    68вҶ’    results.push(...interviewResults)
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’    // Phase 3: Score candidates
    71вҶ’    const scored = await scoreCandidates(anthropic, description, results)
    72вҶ’    broadcast('hire:scores', {
    73вҶ’      hireId,
    74вҶ’      scores: scored.map((r) => ({
    75вҶ’        candidateId: r.candidate.id,
    76вҶ’        weighted: r.scores!.weighted,
    77вҶ’      })),
    78вҶ’    })
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’    // Find winner (highest weighted score; tiebreak: shorter system_prompt)
    81вҶ’    const sorted = [...scored]
    82вҶ’      .filter((r) => r.scores)
    83вҶ’      .sort((a, b) => {
    84вҶ’        const diff = b.scores!.weighted - a.scores!.weighted
    85вҶ’        if (Math.abs(diff) > 0.01) return diff
    86вҶ’        return a.candidate.system_prompt.length - b.candidate.system_prompt.length
    87вҶ’      })
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’    if (sorted.length === 0) {
    90вҶ’      broadcast('hire:error', { hireId, message: 'All candidates failed scoring' })
    91вҶ’      return
    92вҶ’    }
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’    const winner = sorted[0]
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’    // Phase 4: Hire winner
    97вҶ’    const profile = await hireWinner(winner.candidate)
    98вҶ’    broadcast('hire:complete', { hireId, agent: profile })
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’    // Phase 5: Archive results
   101вҶ’    await archiveResults(hireId, description, results)
   102вҶ’  } catch (err: unknown) {
   103вҶ’    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)
   104вҶ’    broadcast('hire:error', { hireId, message })
   105вҶ’  }
   106вҶ’}
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’async function generateCandidates(
   109вҶ’  anthropic: Anthropic,
   110вҶ’  description: string
   111вҶ’): Promise<Candidate[]> {
   112вҶ’  const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
   113вҶ’    model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
   114вҶ’    max_tokens: 2048,
   115вҶ’    messages: [
   116вҶ’      {
   117вҶ’        role: 'user',
   118вҶ’        content: `You are a hiring manager at ClawCorp, an autonomous AI organization.
   119вҶ’
   120вҶ’The Chairman needs: "${description}"
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’Generate 3 distinct agent profiles in JSON array format. Each should have:
   123вҶ’- id: a short kebab-case slug (e.g. "sql-optimizer")
   124вҶ’- title: a human-readable job title
   125вҶ’- department: one of "Engineering", "Research Lab", or "Product"
   126вҶ’- description: one sentence describing this agent's specialty
   127вҶ’- reports_to: infer from department вҖ” "principal-investigator" for Research Lab, "chairman" for others
   128вҶ’- system_prompt: specific, actionable instructions including the 3 mandatory rules:
   129вҶ’  1. Never ask clarifying questions вҖ” make assumptions and proceed
   130вҶ’  2. Use escalate tool if blocked
   131вҶ’  3. Use report tool when done
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’Each candidate should have a different specialization angle or prompting strategy.
   134вҶ’Return ONLY a JSON array, no explanation or markdown fences.`,
   135вҶ’      },
   136вҶ’    ],
   137вҶ’  })
   138вҶ’
   139вҶ’  const text =
   140вҶ’    response.content[0].type === 'text' ? response.content[0].text : ''
   141вҶ’  // Extract JSON array from response (handle possible markdown fences)
   142вҶ’  const jsonMatch = text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/)
   143вҶ’  if (!jsonMatch) throw new Error('Failed to parse candidates from LLM response')
   144вҶ’  return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0])
   145вҶ’}
   146вҶ’
   147вҶ’async function runInterview(candidate: Candidate): Promise<InterviewResult> {
   148вҶ’  const testTask =
   149вҶ’    TEST_TASKS[candidate.department] ?? TEST_TASKS['Engineering']
   150вҶ’
   151вҶ’  const prompt = `${candidate.system_prompt}\n\nTASK: ${testTask}`
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’  try {
   154вҶ’    const proc = Bun.spawn(
   155вҶ’      ['claude', '--dangerously-skip-permissions', '-p', prompt],
   156вҶ’      {
   157вҶ’        cwd: '/tmp',
   158вҶ’        stdout: 'pipe',
   159вҶ’        stderr: 'pipe',
   160вҶ’        env: {
   161вҶ’          ...process.env,
   162вҶ’          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:
   163вҶ’            process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ??
   164вҶ’            process.env.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN ??
   165вҶ’            '',
   166вҶ’          CLAUDECODE: undefined as unknown as string,
   167вҶ’          CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT: undefined as unknown as string,
   168вҶ’        },
   169вҶ’      }
   170вҶ’    )
   171вҶ’
   172вҶ’    // 60s timeout
   173вҶ’    const timeout = setTimeout(() => proc.kill(), 60_000)
   174вҶ’
   175вҶ’    const output = await new Response(proc.stdout).text()
   176вҶ’    const exitCode = await proc.exited
   177вҶ’    clearTimeout(timeout)
   178вҶ’
   179вҶ’    return { candidate, output, exitCode }
   180вҶ’  } catch {
   181вҶ’    return { candidate, output: '', exitCode: 1 }
   182вҶ’  }
   183вҶ’}
   184вҶ’
   185вҶ’async function scoreCandidates(
   186вҶ’  anthropic: Anthropic,
   187вҶ’  description: string,
   188вҶ’  results: InterviewResult[]
   189вҶ’): Promise<InterviewResult[]> {
   190вҶ’  const candidateSummaries = results
   191вҶ’    .map(
   192вҶ’      (r, i) =>
   193вҶ’        `## Candidate ${i + 1}: ${r.candidate.title} (${r.candidate.id})
   194вҶ’Department: ${r.candidate.department}
   195вҶ’Description: ${r.candidate.description}
   196вҶ’Exit Code: ${r.exitCode}
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’### Test Output:
   199вҶ’${r.output.slice(0, 3000)}
   200вҶ’`
   201вҶ’    )
   202вҶ’    .join('\n---\n')
   203вҶ’
   204вҶ’  const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
   205вҶ’    model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
   206вҶ’    max_tokens: 1024,
   207вҶ’    messages: [
   208вҶ’      {
   209вҶ’        role: 'user',
   210вҶ’        content: `You are evaluating candidates for: "${description}"
   211вҶ’
   212вҶ’${candidateSummaries}
   213вҶ’
   214вҶ’Score each candidate 0-10 on these dimensions:
   215вҶ’- task_completion (40%): Did they actually do what was asked?
   216вҶ’- output_quality (30%): Is the output correct, precise, useful?
   217вҶ’- autonomy (20%): Did they make decisions without asking questions?
   218вҶ’- conciseness (10%): Did they avoid unnecessary verbosity?
   219вҶ’
   220вҶ’Return ONLY a JSON array of objects with candidateId and the 4 scores. No explanation.
   221вҶ’Example: [{"candidateId": "foo", "task_completion": 8, "output_quality": 7, "autonomy": 9, "conciseness": 8}]`,
   222вҶ’      },
   223вҶ’    ],
   224вҶ’  })
   225вҶ’
   226вҶ’  const text =
   227вҶ’    response.content[0].type === 'text' ? response.content[0].text : ''
   228вҶ’  const jsonMatch = text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/)
   229вҶ’  if (!jsonMatch) return results
   230вҶ’
   231вҶ’  const scores: Array<{
   232вҶ’    candidateId: string
   233вҶ’    task_completion: number
   234вҶ’    output_quality: number
   235вҶ’    autonomy: number
   236вҶ’    conciseness: number
   237вҶ’  }> = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0])
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’  return results.map((r) => {
   240вҶ’    const s = scores.find((sc) => sc.candidateId === r.candidate.id)
   241вҶ’    if (!s) return r
   242вҶ’    const weighted =
   243вҶ’      s.task_completion * 0.4 +
   244вҶ’      s.output_quality * 0.3 +
   245вҶ’      s.autonomy * 0.2 +
   246вҶ’      s.conciseness * 0.1
   247вҶ’    return {
   248вҶ’      ...r,
   249вҶ’      scores: { ...s, weighted: Math.round(weighted * 100) / 100 },
   250вҶ’    }
   251вҶ’  })
   252вҶ’}
   253вҶ’
   254вҶ’async function hireWinner(candidate: Candidate) {
   255вҶ’  const agentDir = join(AGENTS_DIR, candidate.id)
   256вҶ’
   257вҶ’  // Avoid collision вҖ” append timestamp if exists
   258вҶ’  const finalId = existsSync(agentDir)
   259вҶ’    ? `${candidate.id}-${Date.now()}`
   260вҶ’    : candidate.id
   261вҶ’  const finalDir = join(AGENTS_DIR, finalId)
   262вҶ’
   263вҶ’  await mkdir(finalDir, { recursive: true })
   264вҶ’
   265вҶ’  const profile = {
   266вҶ’    id: finalId,
   267вҶ’    title: candidate.title,
   268вҶ’    department: candidate.department,
   269вҶ’    description: candidate.description,
   270вҶ’    driver: {
   271вҶ’      type: 'claude-code',
   272вҶ’      command: 'claude',
   273вҶ’      args: ['--dangerously-skip-permissions', '-p', '{{full_prompt}}'],
   274вҶ’      system_prompt: candidate.system_prompt,
   275вҶ’    },
   276вҶ’    reports_to: candidate.reports_to,
   277вҶ’    subordinates: [],
   278вҶ’    cost_model: 'medium',
   279вҶ’  }
   280вҶ’
   281вҶ’  await writeFile(join(finalDir, 'profile.json'), JSON.stringify(profile, null, 2))
   282вҶ’  await writeFile(join(finalDir, 'memory.md'), `# ${candidate.title} Memory\n\n`)
   283вҶ’
   284вҶ’  return profile
   285вҶ’}
   286вҶ’
   287вҶ’async function archiveResults(
   288вҶ’  hireId: string,
   289вҶ’  description: string,
   290вҶ’  results: InterviewResult[]
   291вҶ’) {
   292вҶ’  const dir = join(ARCHIVE_DIR, 'interviews')
   293вҶ’  await mkdir(dir, { recursive: true })
   294вҶ’
   295вҶ’  const record = {
   296вҶ’    hireId,
   297вҶ’    description,
   298вҶ’    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
   299вҶ’    candidates: results.map((r) => ({
   300вҶ’      ...r.candidate,
   301вҶ’      exitCode: r.exitCode,
   302вҶ’      output: r.output,
   303вҶ’      scores: r.scores,
   304вҶ’    })),
   305вҶ’    winner: results
   306вҶ’      .filter((r) => r.scores)
   307вҶ’      .sort((a, b) => (b.scores?.weighted ?? 0) - (a.scores?.weighted ?? 0))[0]
   308вҶ’      ?.candidate.id,
   309вҶ’  }
   310вҶ’
   311вҶ’  await writeFile(
   312вҶ’    join(dir, `H-${hireId}.json`),
   313вҶ’    JSON.stringify(record, null, 2)
   314вҶ’  )
   315вҶ’}
   316вҶ’

1вҶ’#!/usr/bin/env bun
     2вҶ’/**
     3вҶ’ * ClawCorp MCP Server (stdio transport)
     4вҶ’ * Spawned by Claude Code agents via .claude/settings.json
     5вҶ’ * Communicates with ClawCorp main server via HTTP
     6вҶ’ */
     7вҶ’import { Server } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/index.js'
     8вҶ’import { StdioServerTransport } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js'
     9вҶ’import {
    10вҶ’  CallToolRequestSchema,
    11вҶ’  ListToolsRequestSchema,
    12вҶ’} from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js'
    13вҶ’import { readFile, writeFile } from 'fs/promises'
    14вҶ’import { join } from 'path'
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’const BASE_URL = process.env.CLAWCORP_SERVER ?? 'http://localhost:3001'
    17вҶ’const AGENT_ID = process.env.CLAWCORP_AGENT_ID ?? 'unknown'
    18вҶ’const MISSION_ID = process.env.CLAWCORP_MISSION_ID ?? 'unknown'
    19вҶ’const AGENTS_DIR = process.env.CLAWCORP_AGENTS_DIR ?? join(import.meta.dir, '../../../agents')
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’async function api(method: string, path: string, body?: unknown) {
    22вҶ’  const res = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${path}`, {
    23вҶ’    method,
    24вҶ’    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    25вҶ’    body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
    26вҶ’  })
    27вҶ’  return res.json()
    28вҶ’}
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’const server = new Server(
    31вҶ’  { name: 'clawcorp', version: '1.0.0' },
    32вҶ’  { capabilities: { tools: {} } }
    33вҶ’)
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’server.setRequestHandler(ListToolsRequestSchema, async () => ({
    36вҶ’  tools: [
    37вҶ’    {
    38вҶ’      name: 'escalate',
    39вҶ’      description: 'Ask your supervisor when you are blocked. Do NOT use this for simple decisions вҖ” make assumptions instead. Only escalate genuine blockers.',
    40вҶ’      inputSchema: {
    41вҶ’        type: 'object',
    42вҶ’        properties: {
    43вҶ’          question: { type: 'string', description: 'The specific question or blocker' },
    44вҶ’          context: { type: 'string', description: 'Relevant context for the supervisor' },
    45вҶ’        },
    46вҶ’        required: ['question'],
    47вҶ’      },
    48вҶ’    },
    49вҶ’    {
    50вҶ’      name: 'delegate',
    51вҶ’      description: 'Assign a sub-task to one of your subordinate agents.',
    52вҶ’      inputSchema: {
    53вҶ’        type: 'object',
    54вҶ’        properties: {
    55вҶ’          agent_id: { type: 'string', description: 'ID of the subordinate agent' },
    56вҶ’          task: { type: 'string', description: 'Full task description for the agent' },
    57вҶ’          workspace: { type: 'string', description: 'Workspace directory for the task (optional)' },
    58вҶ’        },
    59вҶ’        required: ['agent_id', 'task'],
    60вҶ’      },
    61вҶ’    },
    62вҶ’    {
    63вҶ’      name: 'report',
    64вҶ’      description: 'Report task completion to your supervisor. Call this when your work is done.',
    65вҶ’      inputSchema: {
    66вҶ’        type: 'object',
    67вҶ’        properties: {
    68вҶ’          summary: { type: 'string', description: 'Summary of what was accomplished' },
    69вҶ’          artifacts: {
    70вҶ’            type: 'array',
    71вҶ’            items: { type: 'string' },
    72вҶ’            description: 'List of file paths created/modified',
    73вҶ’          },
    74вҶ’        },
    75вҶ’        required: ['summary'],
    76вҶ’      },
    77вҶ’    },
    78вҶ’    {
    79вҶ’      name: 'memory_read',
    80вҶ’      description: 'Read your long-term memory (past learnings and preferences).',
    81вҶ’      inputSchema: {
    82вҶ’        type: 'object',
    83вҶ’        properties: {},
    84вҶ’      },
    85вҶ’    },
    86вҶ’    {
    87вҶ’      name: 'memory_write',
    88вҶ’      description: 'Write to your long-term memory. Use this to save important learnings.',
    89вҶ’      inputSchema: {
    90вҶ’        type: 'object',
    91вҶ’        properties: {
    92вҶ’          content: { type: 'string', description: 'Content to append to memory' },
    93вҶ’        },
    94вҶ’        required: ['content'],
    95вҶ’      },
    96вҶ’    },
    97вҶ’  ],
    98вҶ’}))
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’server.setRequestHandler(CallToolRequestSchema, async (request) => {
   101вҶ’  const { name, arguments: args } = request.params
   102вҶ’  const a = (args ?? {}) as Record<string, unknown>
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’  try {
   105вҶ’    switch (name) {
   106вҶ’      case 'escalate': {
   107вҶ’        // Create escalation message
   108вҶ’        const msg = await api('POST', '/api/messages', {
   109вҶ’          from: AGENT_ID,
   110вҶ’          missionId: MISSION_ID,
   111вҶ’          type: 'escalate',
   112вҶ’          question: a.question,
   113вҶ’          context: a.context ?? '',
   114вҶ’        })
   115вҶ’
   116вҶ’        // Poll for answer (max 10 minutes)
   117вҶ’        const maxWait = 10 * 60 * 1000
   118вҶ’        const interval = 4000
   119вҶ’        const start = Date.now()
   120вҶ’
   121вҶ’        while (Date.now() - start < maxWait) {
   122вҶ’          await Bun.sleep(interval)
   123вҶ’          const updated = await api('GET', `/api/messages/${msg.id}`)
   124вҶ’          if (updated.status === 'answered') {
   125вҶ’            return { content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Supervisor answered: ${updated.answer}` }] }
   126вҶ’          }
   127вҶ’        }
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’        return {
   130вҶ’          content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'No answer received in time. Make your best judgment and proceed.' }],
   131вҶ’        }
   132вҶ’      }
   133вҶ’
   134вҶ’      case 'delegate': {
   135вҶ’        const result = await api('POST', '/api/delegate', {
   136вҶ’          fromAgentId: AGENT_ID,
   137вҶ’          toAgentId: a.agent_id,
   138вҶ’          missionId: MISSION_ID,
   139вҶ’          task: a.task,
   140вҶ’          workspace: a.workspace,
   141вҶ’        })
   142вҶ’        return {
   143вҶ’          content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Delegated to ${a.agent_id}. Sub-mission: ${result.subMissionId}. Waiting for completion...` }],
   144вҶ’        }
   145вҶ’      }
   146вҶ’
   147вҶ’      case 'report': {
   148вҶ’        await api('POST', '/api/messages', {
   149вҶ’          from: AGENT_ID,
   150вҶ’          missionId: MISSION_ID,
   151вҶ’          type: 'report',
   152вҶ’          summary: a.summary,
   153вҶ’          artifacts: a.artifacts ?? [],
   154вҶ’        })
   155вҶ’        return {
   156вҶ’          content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Report submitted. Mission ${MISSION_ID} marked complete.` }],
   157вҶ’        }
   158вҶ’      }
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’      case 'memory_read': {
   161вҶ’        const memPath = join(AGENTS_DIR, AGENT_ID, 'memory.md')
   162вҶ’        const content = await readFile(memPath, 'utf-8').catch(() => '(empty)')
   163вҶ’        return { content: [{ type: 'text', text: content }] }
   164вҶ’      }
   165вҶ’
   166вҶ’      case 'memory_write': {
   167вҶ’        const memPath = join(AGENTS_DIR, AGENT_ID, 'memory.md')
   168вҶ’        const existing = await readFile(memPath, 'utf-8').catch(() => '')
   169вҶ’        const timestamp = new Date().toISOString()
   170вҶ’        await writeFile(memPath, `${existing}\n\n## ${timestamp}\n${a.content}`)
   171вҶ’        return { content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Memory saved.' }] }
   172вҶ’      }
   173вҶ’
   174вҶ’      default:
   175вҶ’        return { content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Unknown tool: ${name}` }], isError: true }
   176вҶ’    }
   177вҶ’  } catch (err) {
   178вҶ’    return {
   179вҶ’      content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Tool error: ${(err as Error).message}` }],
   180вҶ’      isError: true,
   181вҶ’    }
   182вҶ’  }
   183вҶ’})
   184вҶ’
   185вҶ’const transport = new StdioServerTransport()
   186вҶ’await server.connect(transport)
   187вҶ’

1вҶ’import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2вҶ’import { useWebSocket } from './hooks/useWebSocket'
     3вҶ’
     4вҶ’type Agent = {
     5вҶ’  id: string
     6вҶ’  title: string
     7вҶ’  department: string
     8вҶ’  description: string
     9вҶ’  status: 'idle' | 'running' | 'error'
    10вҶ’  reports_to?: string
    11вҶ’  subordinates?: string[]
    12вҶ’}
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’type Mission = {
    15вҶ’  id: string
    16вҶ’  title: string

   152вҶ’function formatMessageTime(ts: string) {
   153вҶ’  const date = new Date(ts)
   154вҶ’  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return ts
   155вҶ’  return date.toLocaleString([], { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
   156вҶ’}
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’export default function App() {
   159вҶ’  const [tab, setTab] = useState<'tasks' | 'inbox' | 'agents'>('tasks')
   160вҶ’  const [agents, setAgents] = useState<Agent[]>([])
   161вҶ’  const [missions, setMissions] = useState<Mission[]>([])
   162вҶ’  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([])
   163вҶ’  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<LogLine[]>([])
   164вҶ’  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([])
   165вҶ’
   166вҶ’  const [newTitle, setNewTitle] = useState('')
   167вҶ’  const [showQuickAdd, setShowQuickAdd] = useState(false)
   168вҶ’  const [newTaskTitle, setNewTaskTitle] = useState('')
   169вҶ’
   170вҶ’  const [runTarget, setRunTarget] = useState<{
   171вҶ’    missionId: string
   172вҶ’    prompt: string
   173вҶ’    workspace: string
   174вҶ’    sessions: Record<string, string>
   175вҶ’  } | null>(null)
   176вҶ’  const [selectedAgent, setSelectedAgent] = useState('')
   177вҶ’  const [resumeSession, setResumeSession] = useState(false)
   178вҶ’
   179вҶ’  const [showSmartHire, setShowSmartHire] = useState(false)
   180вҶ’  const [smartHireDesc, setSmartHireDesc] = useState('')
   181вҶ’  const [hiringInProgress, setHiringInProgress] = useState(false)
   182вҶ’
   183вҶ’  const [answerTarget, setAnswerTarget] = useState<Message | null>(null)
   184вҶ’  const [answerText, setAnswerText] = useState('')
   185вҶ’
   186вҶ’  const [dragMission, setDragMission] = useState<string | null>(null)
   187вҶ’  const [dragTask, setDragTask] = useState<string | null>(null)
   188вҶ’  const [pushBackTarget, setPushBackTarget] = useState<Task | null>(null)
   189вҶ’  const [pushBackText, setPushBackText] = useState('')
   190вҶ’
   191вҶ’  const logScrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   192вҶ’
   193вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
   194вҶ’    fetch('/api/agents')
   195вҶ’      .then((r) => r.json())
   196вҶ’      .then((d) => setAgents(d.map((a: Agent) => ({ ...a, status: 'idle' }))))
   197вҶ’      .then(() =>
   198вҶ’        fetch('/api/run')
   199вҶ’          .then((r) => r.json())
   200вҶ’          .then((running: string[]) => {
   201вҶ’            if (running.length > 0)
   202вҶ’              setAgents((p) => p.map((a) => (running.includes(a.id) ? { ...a, status: 'running' } : a)))
   203вҶ’          })
   204вҶ’      )
   205вҶ’      .catch(console.error)
   206вҶ’
   207вҶ’    fetch('/api/missions').then((r) => r.json()).then(setMissions).catch(console.error)
   208вҶ’    fetch('/api/messages').then((r) => r.json()).then(setMessages).catch(console.error)
   209вҶ’    fetch('/api/tasks').then((r) => r.json()).then(setTasks).catch(console.error)
   210вҶ’  }, [])
   211вҶ’
   212вҶ’  useEffect(() => {
   213вҶ’    if (!logScrollRef.current) return
   214вҶ’    logScrollRef.current.scrollTop = logScrollRef.current.scrollHeight
   215вҶ’  }, [logs])
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’  function appendLog(agentId: string, missionId: string, text: string, kind: LogLine['kind']) {
   218вҶ’    setLogs((p) => [...p.slice(-500), { id: logId++, agentId, missionId, text, kind }])
   219вҶ’  }
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’  useWebSocket((msg) => {
   222вҶ’    const { event, data } = msg
   223вҶ’    const d = data as Record<string, string>
   224вҶ’
   225вҶ’    if (event === 'agent:start') {
   226вҶ’      setAgents((p) => p.map((a) => (a.id === d.agentId ? { ...a, status: 'running' } : a)))
   227вҶ’      appendLog(d.agentId, d.missionId, `> started in ${d.workspace ?? 'cwd'}`, 'system')
   228вҶ’    }
   229вҶ’
   230вҶ’    if (event === 'agent:output') appendLog(d.agentId, d.missionId, d.text, 'output')
   231вҶ’    if (event === 'agent:error') appendLog(d.agentId, d.missionId, d.text, 'error')
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’    if (event === 'agent:done') {
   234вҶ’      setAgents((p) => p.map((a) => (a.id === d.agentId ? { ...a, status: 'idle' } : a)))
   235вҶ’      setMissions((p) =>
   236вҶ’        p.map((m) => {
   237вҶ’          if (m.id !== d.missionId) return m
   238вҶ’          const updated = { ...m, current_stage: 'done', status: 'done' }
   239вҶ’          if (d.sessionId) updated.sessions = { ...m.sessions, [d.agentId]: d.sessionId }
   240вҶ’          return updated
   241вҶ’        })
   242вҶ’      )
   243вҶ’      appendLog(d.agentId, d.missionId, `< done (exit ${d.exitCode})`, 'system')
   244вҶ’    }
   245вҶ’
   246вҶ’    if (event === 'agent:killed') {
   247вҶ’      setAgents((p) => p.map((a) => (a.id === d.agentId ? { ...a, status: 'idle' } : a)))
   248вҶ’      appendLog(d.agentId, '', 'x killed', 'error')
   249вҶ’    }
   250вҶ’
   251вҶ’    if (event === 'message:new') {
   252вҶ’      const m = data as unknown as Message
   253вҶ’      setMessages((p) => [...p, m])
   254вҶ’      if (m.type === 'escalate') {
   255вҶ’        appendLog(m.from, m.missionId, `! escalated to ${m.to}: ${m.question}`, 'system')
   256вҶ’      } else if (m.type === 'report') {
   257вҶ’        appendLog(m.from, m.missionId, `+ report to ${m.to}: ${m.summary}`, 'system')
   258вҶ’      }
   259вҶ’    }
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’    if (event === 'mission:done') {
   262вҶ’      setMissions((p) => p.map((m) => (m.id === d.missionId ? { ...m, current_stage: 'done', status: 'done' } : m)))
   263вҶ’    }
   264вҶ’
   265вҶ’    if (event === 'mission:updated') {
   266вҶ’      const updated = data as unknown as Mission
   267вҶ’      setMissions((p) => p.map((m) => (m.id === updated.id ? updated : m)))
   268вҶ’    }
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’    if (event === 'task:created') {
   271вҶ’      const task = data as unknown as Task
   272вҶ’      setTasks((p) => [...p, task])
   273вҶ’    }
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’    if (event === 'task:updated') {
   276вҶ’      const updated = data as unknown as Task
   277вҶ’      setTasks((p) => p.map((t) => (t.id === updated.id ? updated : t)))
   278вҶ’    }
   279вҶ’
   280вҶ’    if (event === 'task:deleted') {
   281вҶ’      const deleted = data as unknown as { id: string }
   282вҶ’      setTasks((p) => p.filter((t) => t.id !== deleted.id))
   283вҶ’    }
   284вҶ’
   285вҶ’    // Smart Hire events
   286вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:start') {
   287вҶ’      setHiringInProgress(true)
   288вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] Generating 3 candidates for: "${d.description}"`, 'system')
   289вҶ’    }
   290вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:candidates') {
   291вҶ’      const cands = (data as { candidates: Array<{ id: string; title: string }> }).candidates
   292вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] Generated: ${cands.map((c) => c.id).join(', ')}`, 'system')
   293вҶ’    }
   294вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:interview_start') {
   295вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] Interviewing ${d.candidateId}...`, 'system')
   296вҶ’    }
   297вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:interview_done') {
   298вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] ${d.candidateId} finished (exit ${d.exitCode})`, 'system')
   299вҶ’    }
   300вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:scores') {
   301вҶ’      const scores = (data as { scores: Array<{ candidateId: string; weighted: number }> }).scores
   302вҶ’      const summary = scores.map((s) => `${s.candidateId}: ${s.weighted}`).join(' / ')
   303вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] Scores: ${summary}`, 'system')
   304вҶ’    }
   305вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:complete') {
   306вҶ’      setHiringInProgress(false)
   307вҶ’      const agent = (data as { agent: Agent }).agent
   308вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] Hired: ${agent.title} (${agent.id})`, 'system')
   309вҶ’      setAgents((p) => [...p, { ...agent, status: 'idle' as const }])
   310вҶ’    }
   311вҶ’    if (event === 'hire:error') {
   312вҶ’      setHiringInProgress(false)
   313вҶ’      appendLog('hire', '', `[hire] Failed: ${d.message}`, 'error')
   314вҶ’    }
   315вҶ’  })
   316вҶ’
   317вҶ’  async function createMission() {
   318вҶ’    if (!newTitle.trim()) return false
   319вҶ’    const res = await fetch('/api/missions', {
   320вҶ’      method: 'POST',
   321вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   322вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({ title: newTitle, type: 'engineering', workspace: null }),
   323вҶ’    })
   324вҶ’
   325вҶ’    const mission = await res.json()
   326вҶ’    setMissions((p) => [...p, mission])
   327вҶ’    setNewTitle('')
   328вҶ’    return true
   329вҶ’  }
   330вҶ’
   331вҶ’  async function startRun() {
   332вҶ’    if (!runTarget || !selectedAgent) return
   333вҶ’    const sessionId = resumeSession ? runTarget.sessions[selectedAgent] : undefined
   334вҶ’
   335вҶ’    await fetch('/api/run', {
   336вҶ’      method: 'POST',
   337вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   338вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({
   339вҶ’        agentId: selectedAgent,
   340вҶ’        missionId: runTarget.missionId,
   341вҶ’        prompt: runTarget.prompt,
   342вҶ’        workspace: runTarget.workspace || undefined,
   343вҶ’        resume: resumeSession && !sessionId,
   344вҶ’        sessionId,
   345вҶ’      }),
   346вҶ’    })
   347вҶ’
   348вҶ’    setMissions((p) =>
   349вҶ’      p.map((m) =>
   350вҶ’        m.id === runTarget.missionId ? { ...m, current_stage: 'development', assignee: selectedAgent } : m
   351вҶ’      )
   352вҶ’    )
   353вҶ’
   354вҶ’    setRunTarget(null)
   355вҶ’    setSelectedAgent('')
   356вҶ’    setResumeSession(false)
   357вҶ’  }
   358вҶ’
   359вҶ’  async function startSmartHire() {
   360вҶ’    if (!smartHireDesc.trim()) return
   361вҶ’    await fetch('/api/hire/smart', {
   362вҶ’      method: 'POST',
   363вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   364вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({ description: smartHireDesc }),
   365вҶ’    })
   366вҶ’    setShowSmartHire(false)
   367вҶ’    setSmartHireDesc('')
   368вҶ’  }
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’  async function fireAgent(id: string) {
   371вҶ’    if (!confirm(`Fire agent "${id}"? They will be archived.`)) return
   372вҶ’    await fetch(`/api/hire/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
   373вҶ’    setAgents((p) => p.filter((a) => a.id !== id))
   374вҶ’  }
   375вҶ’
   376вҶ’  async function answerMessage() {
   377вҶ’    if (!answerTarget || !answerText.trim()) return
   378вҶ’    await fetch(`/api/messages/${answerTarget.id}/answer`, {
   379вҶ’      method: 'POST',
   380вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   381вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({ answer: answerText }),
   382вҶ’    })
   383вҶ’
   384вҶ’    setMessages((p) =>
   385вҶ’      p.map((m) => (m.id === answerTarget.id ? { ...m, status: 'answered', answer: answerText } : m))
   386вҶ’    )
   387вҶ’
   388вҶ’    setAnswerTarget(null)
   389вҶ’    setAnswerText('')
   390вҶ’  }
   391вҶ’
   392вҶ’  async function dropOnStage(stage: string) {
   393вҶ’    if (!dragMission) return
   394вҶ’
   395вҶ’    const dragged = missions.find((m) => m.id === dragMission)
   396вҶ’    if (!dragged || dragged.current_stage === stage) {
   397вҶ’      setDragMission(null)
   398вҶ’      return
   399вҶ’    }
   400вҶ’
   401вҶ’    await fetch(`/api/missions/${dragMission}`, {
   402вҶ’      method: 'PATCH',
   403вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   404вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({ current_stage: stage }),
   405вҶ’    })
   406вҶ’
   407вҶ’    setMissions((p) => p.map((m) => (m.id === dragMission ? { ...m, current_stage: stage } : m)))
   408вҶ’    setDragMission(null)
   409вҶ’  }
   410вҶ’
   411вҶ’  async function createTask() {
   412вҶ’    if (!newTaskTitle.trim()) return
   413вҶ’    const res = await fetch('/api/tasks', {
   414вҶ’      method: 'POST',
   415вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   416вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({ title: newTaskTitle }),
   417вҶ’    })
   418вҶ’    const task = await res.json()
   419вҶ’    setTasks((p) => [...p, task])
   420вҶ’    setNewTaskTitle('')
   421вҶ’  }
   422вҶ’
   423вҶ’  async function dropOnTaskColumn(column: string) {
   424вҶ’    if (!dragTask) return
   425вҶ’    const dragged = tasks.find((t) => t.id === dragTask)
   426вҶ’    if (!dragged || dragged.status === column) {
   427вҶ’      setDragTask(null)
   428вҶ’      return
   429вҶ’    }
   430вҶ’    await fetch(`/api/tasks/${dragTask}`, {
   431вҶ’      method: 'PATCH',
   432вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   433вҶ’      body: JSON.stringify({ status: column }),
   434вҶ’    })
   435вҶ’    setTasks((p) => p.map((t) => (t.id === dragTask ? { ...t, status: column } : t)))
   436вҶ’    setDragTask(null)
   437вҶ’  }
   438вҶ’
   439вҶ’  async function deleteTask(id: string) {
   440вҶ’    if (!confirm('Delete this task?')) return
   441вҶ’    await fetch(`/api/tasks/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
   442вҶ’    setTasks((p) => p.filter((t) => t.id !== id))
   443вҶ’  }
   444вҶ’
   445вҶ’  async function pushBackTask() {
   446вҶ’    if (!pushBackTarget || !pushBackText.trim()) return
   447вҶ’    await fetch(`/api/tasks/${pushBackTarget.id}`, {
   448вҶ’      method: 'PATCH',
   449вҶ’      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },

   452вҶ’    setTasks((p) =>

   454вҶ’        t.id === pushBackTarget.id
   455вҶ’          ? { ...t, status: 'in_progress', feedback: [...t.feedback, { text: pushBackText, at: new Date().toISOString() }] }

   457вҶ’      )
   458вҶ’    )
   459вҶ’    setPushBackTarget(null)
   460вҶ’    setPushBackText('')

   462вҶ’
   463вҶ’  const missionsByStage = STAGES.reduce((acc, stage) => {

   471вҶ’  function renderAgentNode(agent: Agent, allAgents: Agent[], depth: number): React.ReactNode {

   479вҶ’          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">

   483вҶ’              <span className={`rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-[11px] font-semibold ${DEPT_THEME[agent.department] ?? 'bg-[#e7f2ea] text-[#446658]'}`}>
   484вҶ’                {agent.department}

   487вҶ’            <button onClick={() => fireAgent(agent.id)} className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-[#9d5d52] hover:text-[#b44136]">

   489вҶ’            </button>
   490вҶ’          </div>
   491вҶ’          <p className="mt-1 font-mono text-[10.5px] text-[#6f887b]">{agent.id}</p>
   492вҶ’          <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs leading-relaxed text-[#647d71]">{agent.description}</p>
   493вҶ’          {agent.status === 'running' && (
   494вҶ’            <button
   495вҶ’              onClick={() => fetch(`/api/run/${agent.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })}
   496вҶ’              className="btn-base btn-danger mt-2 py-1 text-xs"
   497вҶ’            >
   498вҶ’              Kill session
   499вҶ’            </button>
   500вҶ’          )}
   501вҶ’        </div>
   502вҶ’
   503вҶ’        {children.length > 0 && (
   504вҶ’          <div className="ml-4 border-l-2 border-[#d8e6dc]">
   505вҶ’            {children.map((child) => renderAgentNode(child, allAgents, depth + 1))}
   506вҶ’          </div>
   507вҶ’        )}
   508вҶ’      </div>
   509вҶ’    )
   510вҶ’  }
